description.value: **Benefit:** Select a school of magic (other than divination ) in which you have Spell Focus âyou cast spells from this school at +1 caster level. Additionally, you gain a single spell-like ability usable up to three times per day. The spell-like ability gained are as follows: Abjuration: resistance Conjuration: acid splash Enchantment: daze Evocation: dancing lights Illusion: ghost sound Necromancy: touch of fatigue Transmutation: mage hand
